frauddetector.detector.CfnAbout: Manages a detector and associated detector versions.

frauddetector.detector.AssociatedModels.Description: The models to associate with this detector. You must provide the ARNs of all the models you want to associate.

frauddetector.detector.DetectorVersionSt.Description: The status of the detector version. If a value is not provided for this property, AWS CloudFormation assumes `DRAFT` status.   Valid values: `ACTIVE | DRAFT`

frauddetector.detector.EventType.Description: The event type associated with this detector.

frauddetector.detector.RuleExecutionMode.Description: The rule execution mode for the rules included in the detector version.  Valid values: `FIRST_MATCHED | ALL_MATCHED` Default value: `FIRST_MATCHED`  You can define and edit the rule mode at the detector version level, when it is in draft status.   If you specify `FIRST_MATCHED`, Amazon Fraud Detector evaluates rules sequentially, first to last, stopping at the first matched rule. Amazon Fraud dectector then provides the outcomes for that single rule.  If you specifiy `ALL_MATCHED`, Amazon Fraud Detector evaluates all rules and returns the outcomes for all matched rules.

frauddetector.detector.Rules.Description: The rules to include in the detector version.

frauddetector.detector.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
